english_definition: to perform the role or function of something
example_sentence: She can act as a mediator in the meeting.
ai_prompt_example: Act as a senior strategy consultant and review this plan.

english_definition: to examine something carefully in detail
ai_prompt_example: Analyze this dataset and identify the key trends.

english_definition: to express clearly in words; clearly expressed
example_sentence: He can articulate complex ideas well.
ai_prompt_example: Articulate the problem statement in plain language.

english_definition: to evaluate or judge the nature or quality of something
example_sentence: We need to assess the risks first.
ai_prompt_example: Assess the strengths and weaknesses of this proposal.

english_definition: to generate ideas quickly and creatively
ai_prompt_example: Brainstorm 20 product ideas for a vocabulary app.

english_definition: to place things into groups or categories
example_sentence: The comments were categorized by theme.
ai_prompt_example: Categorize these customer complaints into 5 themes.

english_definition: to make something clearer or easier to understand
ai_prompt_example: Clarify the main assumptions behind this forecast.

english_definition: to examine similarities and differences
ai_prompt_example: Compare these two business strategies side by side.

english_definition: to form a concept or idea of something
example_sentence: It is hard to conceptualize a system this large.
ai_prompt_example: Conceptualize a mobile app for HKDSE vocabulary learning.

english_definition: to compare in order to show differences
example_sentence: The report contrasts urban and rural demand.
ai_prompt_example: Contrast premium and budget positioning strategies.

english_definition: to make or produce something new
example_sentence: They want to create a new dashboard.
ai_prompt_example: Create a study plan for a beginner learning SQL.

english_definition: to evaluate and comment on something carefully
example_sentence: She asked me to critique her draft.
ai_prompt_example: Critique this landing page from a UX perspective.

english_definition: to find and fix errors in code or systems
example_sentence: He spent hours debugging the script.
ai_prompt_example: Debug this Python code and explain the root cause.

english_definition: to assign responsibility to another person
example_sentence: Good managers know how to delegate.
ai_prompt_example: Delegate these project tasks across a 4-person team.

english_definition: to show clearly or prove
ai_prompt_example: Demonstrate how this algorithm works with a simple example.

english_definition: to revise or prepare text for publication
example_sentence: I need to edit the document tonight.
ai_prompt_example: Edit this paragraph to sound more professional.

english_definition: to explain in more detail; detailed and complex
example_sentence: Can you elaborate on that point?
ai_prompt_example: Elaborate on the pricing logic behind this plan.

english_definition: to judge the value, quality, or importance of something
ai_prompt_example: Evaluate whether this market is attractive to enter.

english_definition: to make larger or more detailed
ai_prompt_example: Expand this outline into a full presentation script.

english_definition: to make something clear by describing it
ai_prompt_example: Explain RAG in simple terms for a beginner.

english_definition: to estimate by extending known information
example_sentence: Analysts extrapolated future demand from current data.
ai_prompt_example: Extrapolate next quarter revenue from these trends.

english_definition: to make something easier
ai_prompt_example: Facilitate a workshop agenda for product discovery.

english_definition: to arrange content in a particular structure
example_sentence: Please format the report as a memo.
ai_prompt_example: Format these notes into a clean executive summary.

english_definition: to produce or create
ai_prompt_example: Generate 10 interview questions for a data analyst role.

english_definition: to form or develop ideas
example_sentence: We need time to ideate before building.
ai_prompt_example: Ideate three monetization models for this app.

english_definition: to explain by giving examples or visuals
ai_prompt_example: Illustrate this concept with a real-world example.

english_definition: to make better
ai_prompt_example: Improve this email so it sounds concise and confident.

english_definition: to estimate a value between known points
ai_prompt_example: Interpolate the missing monthly data points.

english_definition: to repeat and refine
example_sentence: We iterate based on user feedback.
ai_prompt_example: Iterate on this UI concept and propose a better version.

english_definition: to show or prove to be right or reasonable
ai_prompt_example: Justify why this KPI matters for decision-making.

english_definition: to make less extreme; average in degree
ai_prompt_example: Moderate a debate between growth and profitability priorities.

english_definition: to discuss in order to reach agreement
ai_prompt_example: Negotiate a realistic scope with a budget-constrained client.

english_definition: to make as effective as possible
example_sentence: We need to optimize the funnel.
ai_prompt_example: Optimize this workflow for speed and accuracy.

english_definition: to arrange systematically
ai_prompt_example: Organize these messy notes into logical sections.

english_definition: to give the main points of something
ai_prompt_example: Outline a go-to-market plan for the first 90 days.

english_definition: to decide what is most important first
ai_prompt_example: Prioritize these product features by impact and effort.

english_definition: to check text for errors
ai_prompt_example: Proofread this report and fix grammar and tone issues.

english_definition: to limit, modify, or meet requirements
ai_prompt_example: Qualify these conclusions with the key assumptions.

english_definition: to express in numbers
ai_prompt_example: Quantify the potential upside and downside of this decision.

english_definition: to suggest as good or suitable
ai_prompt_example: Recommend the best path based on cost, risk, and speed.

english_definition: to improve by making small changes
ai_prompt_example: Refine this product pitch for enterprise buyers.

english_definition: to say something in different words
ai_prompt_example: Rephrase this paragraph to sound more natural.

english_definition: to examine carefully; an evaluation
example_sentence: I will review the draft tonight.
ai_prompt_example: Review this business case and flag weak arguments.

english_definition: to write again in a different or improved way
example_sentence: He had to rewrite the article.
ai_prompt_example: Rewrite this message to sound polite but firm.

english_definition: to act out a role for practice or simulation
ai_prompt_example: Role-play as a skeptical investor asking tough questions.

english_definition: to make easier to understand or do
ai_prompt_example: Simplify this technical concept for a non-expert audience.

english_definition: to imitate a process or situation
ai_prompt_example: Simulate a customer support chat for this scenario.

english_definition: to plan carefully for success
example_sentence: We need to strategize before launch.
ai_prompt_example: Strategize a market entry plan for Hong Kong first.

english_definition: to arrange parts in an organized way
ai_prompt_example: Structure this answer into problem, analysis, and recommendation.

english_definition: to support with evidence
ai_prompt_example: Substantiate this recommendation with three concrete examples.

english_definition: to mention as a possible idea or option
example_sentence: I suggest waiting one more week.
ai_prompt_example: Suggest three better alternatives to this headline.

english_definition: to give the main points briefly
ai_prompt_example: Summarize this document in five bullet points.

english_definition: to combine ideas into a coherent whole
ai_prompt_example: Synthesize these interview notes into key insights.

english_definition: to change from one language into another
ai_prompt_example: Translate this email into natural Traditional Chinese.

english_definition: to identify and solve problems
example_sentence: The engineer will troubleshoot the issue.
ai_prompt_example: Troubleshoot why this API call is failing.

english_definition: to confirm accuracy or legitimacy
example_sentence: We need to validate the model.
ai_prompt_example: Validate whether these assumptions are realistic.

english_definition: to check that something is true or correct
ai_prompt_example: Verify these claims against the provided data.

english_definition: to form or present as an image
ai_prompt_example: Visualize this process as a simple flowchart.

english_definition: specific tasks to be completed after a discussion
example_sentence: We ended the call with three action items.
ai_prompt_example: Turn these meeting notes into clear action items.

english_definition: a higher level of difficulty or sophistication
example_sentence: This course is for advanced level learners.
ai_prompt_example: Explain the topic at an advanced level for professionals.

english_definition: a comparison of benefits and drawbacks
example_sentence: We discussed the advantages vs disadvantages of outsourcing.
ai_prompt_example: Compare the advantages vs disadvantages of RAG and fine-tuning.

english_definition: showing the state prior to and following a change
example_sentence: The deck included a before and after example.
ai_prompt_example: Show a before and after version of this paragraph.

english_definition: easy for beginners to understand or use
ai_prompt_example: Write a beginner-friendly explanation of APIs.

english_definition: short listed points marked by bullets
example_sentence: Please use bullet points for clarity.
ai_prompt_example: Convert this paragraph into concise bullet points.

english_definition: a list of things to be checked or done
example_sentence: I made a checklist for launch day.
ai_prompt_example: Create a checklist for evaluating a vendor.

english_definition: a table used to compare items across criteria
example_sentence: The report includes a comparison table.
ai_prompt_example: Put these tools into a comparison table by cost and features.

english_definition: a fuller and more complete form
example_sentence: Send me the detailed version tomorrow.
ai_prompt_example: Give me a detailed version with assumptions explained.

english_definition: a representative instance or sample
ai_prompt_example: Give one concrete example for each recommendation.

english_definition: a brief high-level summary for decision-makers
example_sentence: The CEO only read the executive summary.
ai_prompt_example: Write an executive summary for this report.

english_definition: a diagram showing steps in a process
ai_prompt_example: Create a flowchart for this customer journey.

english_definition: a basic structure for understanding or planning
example_sentence: We need a clear framework for analysis.
ai_prompt_example: Propose a framework for evaluating market entry options.

english_definition: a text format for structured data exchange
ai_prompt_example: Return the answer in valid JSON only.

english_definition: the main important points learned
example_sentence: My key takeaways are listed below.
ai_prompt_example: Give me 5 key takeaways from this article.

english_definition: a lightweight text formatting syntax
example_sentence: Please format the answer in markdown.
ai_prompt_example: Convert these notes into clean markdown.

english_definition: a visual diagram showing related ideas
example_sentence: We used a mind map to organize ideas.
ai_prompt_example: Turn this topic into a mind map structure.

english_definition: a list organized by numbers
example_sentence: Use a numbered list for the steps.
ai_prompt_example: Present the process as a numbered list.

english_definition: a single-page summary document
example_sentence: The client asked for a one-pager.
ai_prompt_example: Turn this strategy into a one-pager.

english_definition: benefits and drawbacks
example_sentence: We weighed the pros and cons carefully.
ai_prompt_example: List the pros and cons of outsourcing engineering.

english_definition: presented in a sequence of clear steps
ai_prompt_example: Explain how to set this up step-by-step.

english_definition: presenting the summary before details
example_sentence: I prefer summary first, then details.
ai_prompt_example: Answer in summary first format, then supporting analysis.

traditional_chinese: SWOT 分析；優劣機威分析
simplified_chinese: SWOT 分析；优劣机威分析

english_definition: information arranged in rows and columns
example_sentence: Put the results in a table.
ai_prompt_example: Present this comparison in a table.

english_definition: a pre-designed format or structure
example_sentence: Use this template for all reports.

english_definition: a schedule or sequence of events over time

english_definition: reliable and commanding; based on expertise

english_definition: considering multiple sides fairly

english_definition: relaxed and informal

english_definition: easy to understand

english_definition: logical and well connected

ai_prompt_example: Write a compelling product positioning statement.

english_definition: brief but complete

english_definition: showing imagination and originality
example_sentence: We need a more creative angle.
ai_prompt_example: Suggest 10 creative campaign ideas.

english_definition: highly advanced and innovative
ai_prompt_example: Describe this product as cutting-edge but credible.

english_definition: guided by data rather than intuition alone

english_definition: including many specific parts

english_definition: simple, effective, and graceful

english_definition: showing understanding of others’ feelings

english_definition: interesting and attention-holding
ai_prompt_example: Make this introduction more engaging.

english_definition: morally right; following accepted principles

english_definition: supported by data or proof

english_definition: smooth and natural in speaking or writing

english_definition: official, polite, and structured
ai_prompt_example: Rewrite this in a formal business tone.

english_definition: of very good standard

english_definition: introducing new ideas or methods

english_definition: showing deep understanding

english_definition: based on clear reasoning

english_definition: intended to encourage action or effort

english_definition: normal, easy, and not forced

english_definition: showing subtle distinctions

english_definition: not influenced by personal feelings

english_definition: able to convince people
ai_prompt_example: Make this recommendation more persuasive.

english_definition: exact and accurate
ai_prompt_example: Give a precise definition and one example.

english_definition: high quality and often higher priced
example_sentence: This is a premium service tier.
ai_prompt_example: Position this app as a premium product.

english_definition: relating to work done with competence and polish
ai_prompt_example: Rewrite this email to sound professional and polished.

english_definition: thorough, careful, and strict
ai_prompt_example: Apply a rigorous framework to evaluate the options.

english_definition: strong and able to perform well
ai_prompt_example: Design a robust KPI tracking framework.

english_definition: advanced, refined, and complex
ai_prompt_example: Explain this in a sophisticated but readable way.

english_definition: relating to long-term planning and advantage
ai_prompt_example: Give a strategic recommendation, not just a tactical fix.

english_definition: able to continue long-term without harm
ai_prompt_example: Propose a sustainable growth strategy.

english_definition: relating to practical short-term action
ai_prompt_example: Suggest three tactical actions for the next 30 days.

english_definition: easy for users to understand and use
ai_prompt_example: Make this workflow more user-friendly.

english_definition: a comparison used to explain something
ai_prompt_example: Explain LLMs using an analogy a student can understand.

english_definition: to examine something thoroughly and in depth
ai_prompt_example: Analyze deeply and identify second-order effects.

english_definition: something accepted as true without full proof

english_definition: to divide into smaller parts for understanding
example_sentence: Break down the costs by category.
ai_prompt_example: Break down this strategy into concrete workstreams.

english_definition: a stepwise internal reasoning process
example_sentence: I can follow your chain of thought.

english_definition: to think about other possible options
ai_prompt_example: Consider alternatives before making a final recommendation.

english_definition: describing what did not happen but could have

english_definition: disciplined analysis and evaluation of ideas
ai_prompt_example: Apply critical thinking to challenge these assumptions.

english_definition: a structured method for making decisions
ai_prompt_example: Build a decision framework for vendor selection.

english_definition: reasoning from general rules to a specific conclusion

english_definition: to assess multiple possible choices
example_sentence: We need to evaluate options quickly.
ai_prompt_example: Evaluate options across cost, risk, and complexity.

english_definition: fundamental basic truths used for reasoning
example_sentence: He solved it from first principles.

english_definition: a proposed explanation to be tested
ai_prompt_example: Form a hypothesis for why retention is dropping.

english_definition: reasoning from specific cases to general conclusions
ai_prompt_example: Use induction to infer the broader pattern.

english_definition: a conclusion drawn from evidence and reasoning
ai_prompt_example: Make careful inferences from the available data only.

english_definition: reasoning based on formal logic and consistency
ai_prompt_example: Use logical reasoning to compare these scenarios.

english_definition: a simplified conceptual model of how something works
example_sentence: A good mental model helps decision-making.

english_definition: orderly, systematic, and careful
ai_prompt_example: Be methodical and do not skip steps.

english_definition: evaluation of possible risks and their impact

english_definition: the fundamental underlying cause of a problem

ai_prompt_example: Identify the root cause of this operational issue.

english_definition: planning based on multiple possible future situations
ai_prompt_example: Do scenario planning for best, base, and worst cases.

english_definition: done according to a fixed method or system
ai_prompt_example: Analyze this problem in a systematic way.

english_definition: to reason in a sequential process
ai_prompt_example: Think step by step and show the main logic clearly.

english_definition: to compare positives and negatives before deciding
example_sentence: We should weigh pros and cons first.
ai_prompt_example: Weigh the pros and cons of each option before recommending one.

english_definition: an autonomous or semi-autonomous system that performs tasks
example_sentence: The agent can perform multiple tasks.
ai_prompt_example: Design an AI agent for customer support triage.

english_definition: an interface allowing software systems to communicate

ai_prompt_example: Explain this API integration in simple terms.

english_definition: the output generated by an assistant system

english_definition: a linked sequence of steps or components
example_sentence: The process has a long dependency chain.
ai_prompt_example: Map the chain of actions in this workflow.

english_definition: a program designed to converse with users

english_definition: the amount of text an AI model can consider at once

simplified_chinese: 上下文视窗；上下文容量

english_definition: using a few examples to guide model behavior

english_definition: to adjust a model using additional training

english_definition: AI that creates text, images, audio, or other content

english_definition: an AI output that is false but presented confidently

english_definition: model execution to generate outputs from inputs
ai_prompt_example: Explain the cost difference between training and inference.

english_definition: data or instructions provided to a system

english_definition: combining systems so they work together

english_definition: repeated improvement cycles

english_definition: a machine learning model trained on large text datasets to generate language

english_definition: abbreviation for large language model

english_definition: the result produced by a system

english_definition: settings or variables that shape model behavior

english_definition: an instruction given to a model; to encourage
